policy: artifact drift handling for reproducibility hardening

tier_1_schema.purpose: generator and locked artifact expose the same required top-level schema and gate names

tier_2_numeric_tolerance.purpose: physical numeric outputs agree within declared tolerances even if decimal string tails differ

tier_3_canonical_json.purpose: canonical sorted JSON formatting for stable diffs

allowed_development_drift: metadata key additions before schema lock
decimal formatting differences between fixed and exponent notation
stored decimal tail differences below declared tolerance
extended precision recomputation below declared tolerance
not_allowed_drift: numeric physical output drift beyond declared tolerance
diagnostic reference values entering generation formulas
next_required_actions: cover every generator/data pair in schemas/pr3_regeneration_targets.json
add field-level numeric tolerances for physical outputs
route all generators through canonical JSON serialization
only then enable byte-exact release mode
